message:
feat(fcp-core): add SafeUri parser + to_kebab_case helper with conformance tests

Adds two small standalone utility helpers to the fcp-core util module
that have been needed by callers cleaning up canonical-id and
URI-handling code paths.

SafeUri (crates/fcp-core/src/util/uri.rs):

- Newtype wrapper around `url::Url` with a deterministic Display impl
  that always round-trips through `url::Url::as_str()`. The intent is
  that callers can rely on `SafeUri.to_string()` returning a stable
  canonical form regardless of how the URI was constructed.
- Exposes scheme/host/path/query accessors plus `as_url()` for callers
  that need the underlying parsed URL.
- Implements FromStr (delegating to `url::Url::parse`), AsRef<Url>, and
  From<SafeUri> for Url so it composes with the existing url ecosystem
  without forcing callers to keep two parallel copies.

to_kebab_case (crates/fcp-core/src/util.rs):

- Simple, allocation-conscious converter that lowercases ASCII labels
  and inserts `-` separators on camelCase boundaries (lower→Upper and
  Upper→Upper-when-followed-by-lower), collapses runs of non-
  alphanumeric input into a single `-`, and strips leading/trailing
  whitespace. Non-ASCII input passes through the non-alphanumeric
  fallback path so the output stays predictable.
- Exposed through a private KebabCharKind enum that codifies the
  Lower/Upper/Digit boundary rules.

Build wiring:

- crates/fcp-core/Cargo.toml gains `url.workspace = true` (the version
  is already pinned in the workspace manifest).
- Cargo.lock records the dependency edge from fcp-core → url; no other
  crates pick up new transitive deps.

Tests:

- crates/fcp-core/tests/kebab_case_converter.rs — table-driven cases
  covering camelCase, PascalCase, runs of separators, leading/trailing
  whitespace, digits, and the "ABCDef" → "abc-def" boundary that
  motivated the `next_is_lowercase` lookahead.
- crates/fcp-core/tests/uri_parser_roundtrip.rs — pins
  scheme/host/path/query extraction and Display round-tripping for the
  four canonical SafeUri shapes (https with query, http loopback,
  http+port, opaque scheme without authority).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@ semver.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
+url.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 zeroize = { version = "1.8", features = ["derive"] }
